commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 54% to win, while the sportsbook consensus favors Egypt at 38%. On the draw, sources are closer: the model places it at 29%, the books at 33%, a 4-point gap. The 25-point divergence on the Australia win outcome is the sharpest signal here. Real-money markets may be pricing in recent lineup changes, injury developments, or current form that the statistical model—built on historical Elo ratings—cannot access. Alternatively, the model's assessment of Australia's underlying strength may not yet be reflected in betting flows. The dashboard flags this structural disagreement without claiming which source better captures tournament reality.
